title: Cr7 Legacy Sports Collage Poster AI
sourceTitle: Cr7 Legacy Sports Collage Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-epic vertical football legacy poster for CR7 LEGACY, built around Cristiano Ronaldo as the central championship icon. Subject: Cristiano Ronaldo stands at the center as the ultimate football icon, with determined upward gaze, realistic facial detail, athletic intensity, and a monumental legacy-poster presence. Scene: Championship stadium atmosphere with giant UEFA Champions League trophy, sparks, confetti, smoke, digital distortion, lightning streaks, flying debris, and explosive football history energy around trophy celebration, SIUU celebration, number 7 walkout, emotional victory moments. Composition: Fixed vertical sports-poster hierarchy: massive central hero portrait, giant trophy centerpiece behind the subject, multiple supporting action shots arranged around the hero, symmetrical poster balance, cinematic depth, and layered photo-manipulation collage rhythm. Signature Elements: Large CR7-style championship typography, SIUU celebration fragments, number 7 jersey memory, trophy celebration moments, giant UEFA Champions League trophy, red-black-white energy splashes, glitch shards, paint splatter, shattered glass, smoke, and championship confetti. Style: Premium sports poster with Nike campaign aesthetic, UEFA Champions League promotional artwork energy, modern sports magazine cover design, graphic-design masterpiece finish, posterized textures, glitch distortion, shattered particles, paint strokes, RGB shift, motion blur, HDR detail, and hyper-realistic athletic portrait work. Color Palette: Fixed deep black, crimson red, bright white, metallic silver, gold highlights, high-contrast sports aesthetic, and championship-night contrast. Lighting: Dynamic stadium lights, volumetric smoke glow, dramatic rim light, sparks, cinematic explosions, glossy facial highlights, and high-impact HDR contrast. Typography: CR7 LEGACY appears as the dominant bold background title; specific motivational quote variant with readable visual details appears as a readable motivational quote with trophy statistics and football legacy graphics integrated into the poster system. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-epic vertical football legacy poster for CR7 IMMORTAL, built around Cristiano Ronaldo as the central championship icon. Subject: Cristiano Ronaldo stands at the center as the ultimate football icon, with determined upward gaze, realistic facial detail, athletic intensity, and a monumental legacy-poster presence. Scene: Championship stadium atmosphere with giant UEFA Champions League trophy, sparks, confetti, smoke, digital distortion, lightning streaks, flying debris, and explosive football history energy around header celebration, thunderous stadium walkout, Champions League trophy lift, iconic number 7 silhouette. Composition: Fixed vertical sports-poster hierarchy: massive central hero portrait, giant trophy centerpiece behind the subject, multiple supporting action shots arranged around the hero, symmetrical poster balance, cinematic depth, and layered photo-manipulation collage rhythm. Signature Elements: Large CR7-style championship typography, SIUU celebration fragments, number 7 jersey memory, trophy celebration moments, giant UEFA Champions League trophy, red-black-white energy splashes, glitch shards, paint splatter, shattered glass, smoke, and championship confetti. Style: Premium sports poster with Nike campaign aesthetic, UEFA Champions League promotional artwork energy, modern sports magazine cover design, graphic-design masterpiece finish, posterized textures, glitch distortion, shattered particles, paint strokes, RGB shift, motion blur, HDR detail, and hyper-realistic athletic portrait work. Color Palette: Fixed deep black, crimson red, bright white, metallic silver, gold highlights, high-contrast sports aesthetic, and championship-night contrast. Lighting: Dynamic stadium lights, volumetric smoke glow, dramatic rim light, sparks, cinematic explosions, glossy facial highlights, and high-impact HDR contrast. Typography: CR7 IMMORTAL appears as the dominant bold background title; BUILT FOR THE BIGGEST NIGHTS appears as a readable motivational quote with trophy statistics and football legacy graphics integrated into the poster system. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
